title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manya Group South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Manya Group South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Manya Group South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Manya Group South Asia Partners:
Manya Group South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manya Group South Asia Partners!
